items.title: Men's Bubble Watch: Iowa's inch to lock status, more results from a packed weekend
items.description: Iowa, USC pulled out wins but Ohio State, UCF, West Virginia, Tulsa have work to do after a mixed bubble Sunday.

items.title: Bracketology: Saint Louis could be a real threat come March
items.description: The Billikens are an analytical unicorn -- and shaping up to be the Atlantic 10's next generational team.

items.title: What this NBA trade deadline revealed: Teams are finding new ways to tank
items.description: Much to the irritation of some league insiders, the trade deadline was more than just a flurry of moves: It showed the next evolution in teams racing ...

items.title: 'A glitch in the matrix': How does Ilia Malinin do what seems impossible?
items.description: At the Winter Olympics, figure skater Ilia Malinin intends to land a quad axel -- as well as a backflip and his own "Raspberry Twist."

items.title: 'Quad God,' U.S. defend figure skating team gold
items.description: Ilia Malinin beat rival Shun Sato, helping the U.S. defend its team figure skating gold medal.
